seo.title: Support Worker Agency London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Vigil Care Staffing provides CQC-compliant, fully vetted support workers across every London borough. Rapid placements for care homes, supported living, and specialist settings.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Support Worker Agency London
fields.sub: Support worker agency London services from Vigil Care Staffing provide care providers with dependable, compassionate, and CQC-compliant professionals. Whether you need temporary cover, ongoing placements, or urgent last-minute shifts filled, our temporary staffing solutions ensure your residents or service users receive consistent, person-centred support.

fields.heading: Compassionate, Skilled, and Ready-to-Work Support Workers
fields.body: From care homes to supported living services, our agency care workers bring experience, empathy, and dedication to every role.

items.title: Rapid Placement
items.body: Our temporary placement agency model allows us to fill shifts in hours, not days.

items.title: Compliance First
items.body: We follow strict Care Quality Commission (CQC) guidelines to ensure safety and quality.

items.title: Tailored Staffing
items.body: From complex needs support to companionship, we match staff skills to your service requirements.

items.title: Experienced Professionals
items.body: Every agency care worker has proven experience in health and social care.

items.title: Borough-Wide Network
items.body: Our reach spans all of London, ensuring we can provide local, dependable staff wherever you operate.

items.title: 24/7 Availability
items.body: Cover any shift, at any time.

items.title: Fully Vetted Staff
items.body: Enhanced DBS, reference checks, and skills assessments.

items.title: Flexible Staffing Models
items.body: One-off shifts, block bookings, and long-term contracts.

items.title: Continuity of Care
items.body: Repeat placements with the same staff to ensure familiarity and consistency.

items.title: Reduced Admin
items.body: We handle payroll, compliance, and documentation, letting you focus on care.

items.title: Skills Assessments
items.body: Matching abilities to your service needs.

items.title: Ongoing CPD
items.body: Regular training for updated skills and knowledge.

items.q: How quickly can your support worker agency London provide staff?
items.a: We can often fill roles within hours, thanks to our borough-wide network of qualified support workers.

items.q: Do you provide support workers for specialist needs?
items.a: Yes, our temporary care staffing agency team can match support workers with experience in dementia care, learning disabilities, and complex needs.

items.q: Can I book the same support workers for ongoing shifts?
items.a: Absolutely – continuity of care is one of our priorities.

fields.body: Get a Quote Support worker agency London services from Vigil Care Staffing provide care providers with dependable, compassionate, and CQC-compliant professionals.

Why Choose Vigil Care Staffing for Support Workers in London Staff shortages don’t have to disrupt care. As a leading temporary care staffing agency , Vigil Care Staffing offers quick, reliable access to fully vetted support workers who fit seamlessly into your team.

Benefits of Working with Vigil Care Staffing Agency When you choose Vigil Care Staffing, you’re partnering with a healthcare recruitment agency that puts your needs first. Our key benefits include: 24/7 Availability Cover any shift, at any time.

Borough-Level Coverage and Rapid Response We supply support workers to every borough in London, enabling rapid deployment through our locally based professionals. North London Barnet Enfield Haringey Camden Islington East London Barking and Dagenham Newham Tower Hamlets Waltham Forest Redbridge Havering South London Croydon Sutton Merton Kingston upon Thames Bromley Central London Westminster City of London South East London Greenwich Lewisham Bexley Southwark Islington South West London Wandsworth Richmond upon Thames Lambeth West London Ealing Hounslow Hammersmith and Fulham Kensington and Chelsea Find Support Workers Our Vetting & Compliance Process As a trusted healthcare assistant recruitment agency and care staffing provider, we hold our recruitment to the highest standards.

Our temporary healthcare staffing process aligns with CQC requirements, so you can trust that every placement is competent and compliant. Facilities We Serve Our support worker recruitment services cover a variety of care environments: Residential Care Homes Supported Living Services Day Centres Rehabilitation Units Community-Based Care Private Healthcare Settings Whether you need one agency care worker or a team for a large facility, we can supply qualified staff quickly. Case Study: Consistent Cover in Westminster A Westminster-based supported living service faced ongoing staffing gaps over a six-week period. We provided the same two agency care workers for continuity, ensuring residents maintained strong relationships with familiar faces.

"The consistency made a huge difference to our residents' wellbeing, and Vigil Care Staffing's reliability took the stress out of staffing. " — Service Manager, Westminster Supported Living FAQs How quickly can your support worker agency London provide staff?
